framework.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A
framework.description: Information security controls catalog from Annex A of ISO/IEC 27001:2022, comprising 93 controls organized into Organizational, People, Physical, and Technological themes and governed by the Statement of Applicability.

requirements.name: A.5.1 — Policies for information security
requirements.description: Define, approve, publish, and periodically review a set of policies that govern information security.

requirements.name: A.5.2 — Information security roles and responsibilities
requirements.description: Allocate and communicate clear responsibilities for protecting information.

requirements.name: A.5.3 — Segregation of duties
requirements.description: Separate conflicting duties to reduce opportunities for unauthorized or unintended actions.

requirements.name: A.5.4 — Management responsibilities
requirements.description: Require management to ensure staff apply information security in line with established policies and procedures.

requirements.name: A.5.5 — Contact with authorities
requirements.description: Establish and maintain appropriate contact with relevant authorities.

requirements.name: A.5.6 — Contact with special interest groups
requirements.description: Maintain contact with security forums and specialist professional groups.

requirements.name: A.5.7 — Threat intelligence
requirements.description: Collect and analyze information about security threats to inform protective action.

requirements.name: A.5.8 — Information security in project management
requirements.description: Integrate information security considerations into project management activities.

requirements.name: A.5.9 — Inventory of information and other associated assets
requirements.description: Maintain an inventory of information and associated assets with assigned ownership.

requirements.name: A.5.10 — Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
requirements.description: Establish and enforce rules for the acceptable use and handling of information and assets.

requirements.name: A.5.11 — Return of assets
requirements.description: Ensure personnel return organizational assets on termination or change of employment.

requirements.name: A.5.12 — Classification of information
requirements.description: Classify information according to its security needs and value to the organization.

requirements.name: A.5.13 — Labelling of information
requirements.description: Apply procedures to label information consistently with the classification scheme.

requirements.name: A.5.14 — Information transfer
requirements.description: Protect information transferred within the organization and with external parties.

requirements.name: A.5.15 — Access control
requirements.description: Establish and apply rules to control physical and logical access based on requirements.

requirements.name: A.5.16 — Identity management
requirements.description: Manage the full lifecycle of identities used to access information and assets.

requirements.name: A.5.17 — Authentication information
requirements.description: Control the allocation and management of authentication secrets.

requirements.name: A.5.18 — Access rights
requirements.description: Provision, review, and revoke access rights in line with the access control policy.

requirements.name: A.5.19 — Information security in supplier relationships
requirements.description: Manage the information security risks arising from the use of suppliers.

requirements.name: A.5.20 — Addressing information security within supplier agreements
requirements.description: Establish and agree information security requirements in supplier agreements.

requirements.name: A.5.21 — Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
requirements.description: Manage information security risks across the ICT products and services supply chain.

requirements.name: A.5.22 — Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
requirements.description: Regularly monitor, review, and manage changes to supplier service delivery.

requirements.name: A.5.23 — Information security for use of cloud services
requirements.description: Define processes for securely acquiring, using, managing, and exiting cloud services.

requirements.name: A.5.24 — Information security incident management planning and preparation
requirements.description: Plan and prepare processes, roles, and responsibilities for managing security incidents.

requirements.name: A.5.25 — Assessment and decision on information security events
requirements.description: Assess security events and decide whether to classify them as incidents.

requirements.name: A.5.26 — Response to information security incidents
requirements.description: Respond to security incidents in accordance with documented procedures.

requirements.name: A.5.27 — Learning from information security incidents
requirements.description: Use knowledge gained from incidents to strengthen and improve controls.

requirements.name: A.5.28 — Collection of evidence
requirements.description: Identify, collect, and preserve evidence relating to security events.

requirements.name: A.5.29 — Information security during disruption
requirements.description: Maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruptions.

requirements.name: A.5.30 — ICT readiness for business continuity
requirements.description: Plan, implement, and test ICT readiness to meet business continuity objectives.

requirements.name: A.5.31 — Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
requirements.description: Identify and meet legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual security obligations.

requirements.name: A.5.32 — Intellectual property rights
requirements.description: Protect intellectual property rights and ensure proper licensing of materials.

requirements.name: A.5.33 — Protection of records
requirements.description: Protect records against loss, destruction, falsification, and unauthorized access.

requirements.name: A.5.34 — Privacy and protection of PII
requirements.description: Identify and meet requirements for privacy and protection of personally identifiable information.

requirements.name: A.5.35 — Independent review of information security
requirements.description: Independently review the information security approach at planned intervals.

requirements.name: A.5.36 — Compliance with policies, rules and standards
requirements.description: Regularly verify compliance with information security policies, rules, and standards.

requirements.name: A.5.37 — Documented operating procedures
requirements.description: Document operating procedures and make them available to those who need them.

requirements.name: A.6.1 — Screening
requirements.description: Perform background verification of candidates before employment.

requirements.name: A.6.2 — Terms and conditions of employment
requirements.description: State information security responsibilities in employment terms and conditions.

requirements.name: A.6.3 — Information security awareness, education and training
requirements.description: Provide ongoing awareness, education, and training on information security.

requirements.name: A.6.4 — Disciplinary process
requirements.description: Establish a disciplinary process to address information security policy violations.

requirements.name: A.6.5 — Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
requirements.description: Define and enforce security responsibilities that persist after termination or role change.

requirements.name: A.6.6 — Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
requirements.description: Identify, document, and maintain confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements.

requirements.name: A.6.7 — Remote working
requirements.description: Protect information accessed or processed when personnel work remotely.

requirements.name: A.6.8 — Information security event reporting
requirements.description: Provide a mechanism for personnel to report security events in a timely manner.

requirements.name: A.7.1 — Physical security perimeters
requirements.description: Define and protect physical security perimeters around sensitive areas.

requirements.name: A.7.2 — Physical entry
requirements.description: Protect secure areas with appropriate physical entry controls.

requirements.name: A.7.3 — Securing offices, rooms and facilities
requirements.description: Design and apply physical security for offices, rooms, and facilities.

requirements.name: A.7.4 — Physical security monitoring
requirements.description: Continuously monitor premises for unauthorized physical access.

requirements.name: A.7.5 — Protecting against physical and environmental threats
requirements.description: Design and apply protection against physical and environmental threats.

requirements.name: A.7.6 — Working in secure areas
requirements.description: Apply security measures for working within designated secure areas.

requirements.name: A.7.7 — Clear desk and clear screen
requirements.description: Enforce clear-desk and clear-screen rules to limit exposure of information.

requirements.name: A.7.8 — Equipment siting and protection
requirements.description: Site and protect equipment to reduce environmental and unauthorized-access risks.

requirements.name: A.7.9 — Security of assets off-premises
requirements.description: Protect assets used or stored outside the organization's premises.

requirements.name: A.7.10 — Storage media
requirements.description: Manage storage media throughout its lifecycle per classification and handling rules.

requirements.name: A.7.11 — Supporting utilities
requirements.description: Protect facilities from disruption caused by failures of supporting utilities.

requirements.name: A.7.12 — Cabling security
requirements.description: Protect power and telecommunications cabling from interception and damage.

requirements.name: A.7.13 — Equipment maintenance
requirements.description: Maintain equipment correctly to ensure ongoing availability and integrity.

requirements.name: A.7.14 — Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
requirements.description: Verify removal of data and licensed software before equipment disposal or reuse.

requirements.name: A.8.1 — User endpoint devices
requirements.description: Protect information stored on or accessed via user endpoint devices.

requirements.name: A.8.2 — Privileged access rights
requirements.description: Restrict and manage the allocation and use of privileged access rights.

requirements.name: A.8.3 — Information access restriction
requirements.description: Restrict access to information and functions per the access control policy.

requirements.name: A.8.4 — Access to source code
requirements.description: Manage read and write access to source code, tools, and libraries.

requirements.name: A.8.5 — Secure authentication
requirements.description: Implement secure authentication technologies and procedures.

requirements.name: A.8.6 — Capacity management
requirements.description: Monitor and tune resource usage to meet current and future capacity needs.

requirements.name: A.8.7 — Protection against malware
requirements.description: Implement malware protection reinforced by appropriate user awareness.

requirements.name: A.8.8 — Management of technical vulnerabilities
requirements.description: Obtain information on and evaluate exposure to technical vulnerabilities, then act.

requirements.name: A.8.9 — Configuration management
requirements.description: Establish, document, implement, and monitor secure configurations of systems.

requirements.name: A.8.10 — Information deletion
requirements.description: Delete information held in systems and devices when no longer required.

requirements.name: A.8.11 — Data masking
requirements.description: Use data masking to limit exposure of sensitive data.

requirements.name: A.8.12 — Data leakage prevention
requirements.description: Apply measures to prevent unauthorized disclosure and extraction of sensitive data.

requirements.name: A.8.13 — Information backup
requirements.description: Maintain and regularly test backups in line with an agreed backup policy.

requirements.name: A.8.14 — Redundancy of information processing facilities
requirements.description: Provide sufficient redundancy of processing facilities to meet availability needs.

requirements.name: A.8.15 — Logging
requirements.description: Produce, store, protect, and analyze logs of activities and events.

requirements.name: A.8.16 — Monitoring activities
requirements.description: Monitor networks, systems, and applications for anomalous behavior.

requirements.name: A.8.17 — Clock synchronization
requirements.description: Synchronize system clocks to approved reference time sources.

requirements.name: A.8.18 — Use of privileged utility programs
requirements.description: Restrict and tightly control the use of privileged utility programs.

requirements.name: A.8.19 — Installation of software on operational systems
requirements.description: Apply procedures to securely manage software installation on operational systems.

requirements.name: A.8.20 — Networks security
requirements.description: Secure, manage, and control networks to protect information in systems.

requirements.name: A.8.21 — Security of network services
requirements.description: Identify and apply security mechanisms and service levels for network services.

requirements.name: A.8.22 — Segregation of networks
requirements.description: Segregate groups of services, users, and systems within networks.

requirements.name: A.8.23 — Web filtering
requirements.description: Manage access to external websites to reduce exposure to malicious content.

requirements.name: A.8.24 — Use of cryptography
requirements.description: Define and apply rules for effective use of cryptography and key management.

requirements.name: A.8.25 — Secure development life cycle
requirements.description: Establish and apply rules for secure development across the software lifecycle.

requirements.name: A.8.26 — Application security requirements
requirements.description: Identify, specify, and approve security requirements when developing applications.

requirements.name: A.8.27 — Secure system architecture and engineering principles
requirements.description: Establish and apply secure engineering principles to system architecture.

requirements.name: A.8.28 — Secure coding
requirements.description: Apply secure coding principles throughout software development.

requirements.name: A.8.29 — Security testing in development and acceptance
requirements.description: Define and carry out security testing during development and acceptance.

requirements.name: A.8.30 — Outsourced development
requirements.description: Direct, monitor, and review the security of outsourced system development.

requirements.name: A.8.31 — Separation of development, test and production environments
requirements.description: Separate and protect development, test, and production environments.

requirements.name: A.8.32 — Change management
requirements.description: Subject changes to information processing facilities to change-management procedures.

requirements.name: A.8.33 — Test information
requirements.description: Select, protect, and manage test information appropriately.

requirements.name: A.8.34 — Protection of information systems during audit testing
requirements.description: Plan and agree audit tests to minimize disruption to operational systems.
